title: The Lemon Drop Kid
writer: Howard J. Green, J.P. McEvoy, Damon Runyon
actors: Lee Tracy, Helen Mack, William Frawley
plot: Con artist and racetrack tout Wally Brooks hands a lemon drop to a man in a wheelchair, saying it will cure whatever ails him, then persuades the man, a millionaire named Griggsby, to bet $100 on a horse. Wally knows this horse ca...
